text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The race is starting soon! I'm sooo excited!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely take first place and stand center
stage at the winning concert! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Thank you! ♪ Look forward to the win,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you how cute I am both on the stage and
on the track! ☆
